The '''''Mon Delindo''''' was a [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruiser]] of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].

==History==
During the hunt for [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]], the ''Mon Delindo'' was one of three [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruisers]] assigned to [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] [[Solo Fleet]]. In that campaign, the ''Mon Delindo'' participated in the Battles of [[Battle of Vahaba|Vahaba]] and [[Battle of Selaggis|Selaggis]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
